title: athyrium tejeroi
intro: Athyrium tejeroi is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa, belonging to the genus Athyrium within the family Athyriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Athyrium tejeroi include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by infusing its leaves in hot water, allowing for the extraction of its bioactive compounds and utilization in teas, infusions, and other medicinal preparations.
